rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: PowerShell -encodedcommand Switch

rules.rule_text:
title: PowerShell -encodedcommand Switch
id: 2f0c5dcb-71aa-44d7-abc6-dac43f121138
status: experimental
description: "This detection analytic looks for the execution of powershell.exe with\
  \ command \nlines that include variations of the -encodedcommand argument; PowerShell\
  \ will \nrecognize and accept anything from -e onward, and it will show up outside\
  \ of \nthe encoded bits. Part of the RedCanary 2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/powershell/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059
- attack.t1059.001
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1027
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \powershell.exe
    CommandLine|contains:
    - '-e '
    - '-en '
    - '-enc '
    - '-enco '
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
